comment: CI regression ceilings. `guards` drive bench/check.mjs (runtime, UNTHROTTLED); `bundle` drives bench/size.mjs (build output). Ceilings are deliberately generous (several times observed) so they catch order-of-magnitude regressions — typing that re-renders the whole tree, O(n^2) serialization, or a heavy dep getting bundled into a package — without flaking. Local reference (unthrottled, fast Mac): 10k getHTML ~2.5ms / type p50 ~0.6ms; 50k getHTML ~11ms / type p50 ~2ms. Bundle gzip: core ~15KB, react ~3KB, vue ~3KB (tiptap/prosemirror/framework are external, not counted).
